title: Possibility to place a tracking code in the Monday form or connect Google Analytics

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to be able to place a tracking code in the Monday form, connect a pixel from Facebook or Google Analytics.

On this basis, it would be possible to direct better marketing campaigns of the organization and track user behavior.
